pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh and Subsurface.conf setup, mapping the sample data to this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires applying the 'Deep' tag to all dives with a maximum depth of 18.0 meters or greater, and saving to '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf'. The target logbook contains 29 real dives. Based on a direct analysis of the underlying XML logbook (SampleDivesV2.ssrf), exactly 17 dives have a max depth >= 18.0m and must be tagged 'Deep' (dive numbers: 86, 87, 89, 90, 93, 94, 95, 96, 223, 224, 226, 227, 229, 231, 232, 233, 333). The other 12 dives (dive numbers: 2, 3, 4, 5, 85, 88, 91, 92, 225, 228, 230, 348) are shallower and must NOT be tagged 'Deep'.
